name: hoc/data-table-toolbar
description: A toolbar HOC designed to sit above a DataTable, providing search input, column-filter chips, view-options dropdown (column visibility), and global action buttons (export, add, delete). Integrates directly with the Tanstack Table instance for reactive state synchronization. Composed of Input, Button, DropdownMenu, and Select primitives with i18n label support.
useCases: Search-and-filter bars above user or product grids with text search and status filter chips
Export-toolbars combining CSV download, print view, and column-visibility toggles
Bulk-action toolbars that enable/disable based on current row-selection state
Analytics log viewers with faceted filters for severity, source, and date-range
